intended_use: IB Lab KOALA is a radiological fully-automated image processing software device of either computed (CR) or directly digital (DX) images intended to aid medical professionals in the measurement of mini
intended_use_full: IB Lab KOALA is a radiological fully-automated image processing software device of either computed (CR) or directly digital (DX) images intended to aid medical professionals in the measurement of minimum joint space width; the assessment of the presence or absence of sclerosis, joint space narrowing, and osteophytes based OARSI criteria for these parameters; and, the presence or absence of radiographic knee OA based on Kellgren & Lawrence Grading of standing, fixed-flexion radiographs of the knee.
ground_truth: Ground truth grading for Kellgren Lawrence grades and OARSI grades (osteophyte, sclerosis, joint space narrowing) established by three physicians following adjudication procedures for discrepancies from the Osteoarthritis Initiative (OAI) study
other_metrics: Joint Space Width (JSW) measurements compared via orthogonal linear regression: Medial slope 1.02 (95% CI: 0.99-1.05), intercept -0.08 mm (95% CI: -0.22-0.03); Lateral slope 0.97 (95% CI: 0.93-1.00), intercept 0.08 mm (95% CI: -0.15-0.30)
